channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Officer in Tumakuru alleges harassment by senior, found dead at office
item.description: Mallikarjunaiah G.E., an Assistant Director in the Social Welfare Department in Tumakuru, was found dead at his office in Pavagada. Prior to his death, he recorded a video alleging harassment by his s...

item.title: Former FBI Director and Special Counsel Robert Mueller dies at 81
item.description: Robert S. Mueller III, the former Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and special counsel who led the probe into Russian interference in the 2016 U.S. presidential election and poten...

item.title: Analysis of Reform Party’s Declining Poll Numbers and YouGov’s Methodology
item.description: Nigel Farage has criticised YouGov for allegedly presenting deceptively low polling figures for his party, Reform, claiming that the polling company breached British Polling Council transparency rules...

item.title: Tribal Council Leaders and Kin Contest Assam Assembly Seats
item.description: As Assam gears up for its 2026 Assembly elections, prominent tribal council leaders and their family members are entering the political fray, signalling a new chapter in the state's local politics. Tu...

item.title: Kenya and Uganda Open Railway Extension Amid Heavy Chinese Debt
item.description: Kenya and Uganda have officially opened the extension of the Standard Gauge Railway near their shared border, despite Kenya struggling with heavy Chinese debt. The railway, originally built from Momba...

item.title: Osimhen says his hustle would have made him wealthy outside football
item.description: Victor Osimhen, the 27-year-old striker currently recovering from an injury, says that his work ethic would have led him to wealth even without football. Speaking during a livestream with comedian Car...

item.title: Iran’s missile test raises security concerns for Europe after failed strike on Diego Garcia
item.description: Israel has warned that Iran’s recent missile launch indicates a growing threat to European cities, including London, following an attempted attack on the joint UK–US military base on Diego Garcia in t...

item.title: Air India Updates Fitness Standards for Cabin Crew, Focus on Weight Guidelines
item.description: Air India has recently introduced stricter fitness standards for its cabin crew, with a particular emphasis on maintaining weight within specified limits. This move comes as the airline aims to enhanc...

item.title: Qing Madi Talks About the Emotional Power of Music for Nigerians
item.description: Qing Madi, the 19-year-old Nigerian Afrobeats star, shared her insights on why music holds such a special place in the hearts of Nigerians. According to Madi, music serves as an emotional escape for m...

item.title: Multiple riders involved in crash during San Remo women's cycling race
item.description: A dramatic crash occurred during the San Remo women’s cycling race, with several riders being flung off their bikes in a chaotic incident. The crash took place in a high-speed section of the race, cau...

item.title: Ontario proposes rules to cap ticket resale prices and protect fans
item.description: Ontario is taking steps to address soaring ticket resale prices for concerts, sports, and other live events by proposing new regulations that would prohibit selling tickets above their original cost. ...

item.title: Calls for NCP leadership accountability amid Maharashtra astrologer scandal

item.title: Carpio calls for new legal action against China over fishing rights in the West Philippine Sea
item.description: Nearly ten years after winning a landmark case against China, former Supreme Court Justice Antonio Carpio is urging the Philippine government to file another legal case over China’s continued harassme...

item.title: Finding Authentic Stillness in Tasmania’s Mount Arthur
item.description: In this reflective essay, writer and critic Joseph Earp recounts his evolving relationship with nature, particularly through his visits to Mount Arthur in northern Tasmania. Once a self-professed urba...

item.title: Umahi tells Tracy Ohiri to show credible proof in ₦250m debt claim or face legal action
item.description: The Minister of Works, David Umahi, don talk say businesswoman Tracy Ohiri must bring real proof to back up her claim say him dey owe her ₦250 million, or she go face court matter. The wahala start af...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso warns against complacency ahead of CAF Champions League return leg in Mali
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns head into the second leg of their CAF Champions League quarterfinal against Stade Malien in Bamako, Mali, holding a commanding 3-0 lead from the first leg played at home in Pretoria....

item.title: Premier League Matchweek 31: Everton Face Chelsea in Hill Dickinson Stadium Clash
item.description: The Age’s quick match summary for Premier League Matchweek 31 focuses on the clash between Everton and Chelsea at Hill Dickinson Stadium. The Rapid Recap format provides football fans with key moments...

item.title: Tricycle drivers in Metro Manila quickly spend P5,000 fuel subsidy on rising fuel costs and daily essentials
item.description: Many tricycle drivers in Metro Manila who received the P5,000 cash assistance from the government have reported that the money ran out almost immediately after payout. The subsidy, distributed by the ...

item.title: GGML uses Kilimanjaro Marathon exhibition to promote HIV awareness and testing
item.description: The Geita Gold Mining Limited (GGML) through its Kili Challenge Against HIV/AIDS has taken advantage of the Kilimanjaro Marathon 2026 exhibition in Moshi to intensify awareness and support in the nati...

item.title: God's Command for Fruitfulness: Trusting in His Timing for Blessings
item.description: In this reflective article, Funmi Komolade emphasizes the biblical command for man and woman to be fruitful and multiply, a fundamental purpose of creation according to Genesis 1:27-28. The author del...
